# CloudCast by Quantum Regal

> Professional browser-based broadcast tools — video mixer, audio console, virtual production, instant replay, worship display, and online DAW.

CloudCast is a cloud broadcast production platform by Quantum Regal Digital Labs. Six products sold individually or as CloudCast Universal bundle.

## Products

- Video Mixer: https://cloudcast.live/products/video-mixer — PST/PGM switcher, chroma key, RTMP streaming
- Audio Mixer: https://cloudcast.live/products/audio-mixer — 16-channel broadcast audio console
- Symphony: https://cloudcast.live/products/symphony — browser DAW for music production
- Replay: https://cloudcast.live/products/replay — instant replay for live sports and events
- Regal Display: https://cloudcast.live/products/regal-display — worship presentation and scripture
- Regal Prism: https://cloudcast.live/products/regal-prism — virtual production and chroma key VP

## Solutions

- Churches: https://cloudcast.live/for/churches
- Sports: https://cloudcast.live/for/sports
- News: https://cloudcast.live/for/news
- Corporate events: https://cloudcast.live/for/corporate

## Pricing

https://cloudcast.live/pricing — Free tier, Pro $29/mo, Pro Master $79/mo, Universal from $59/mo

## Guides

- Product guide: https://cloudcast.live/products/guide
- All products: https://cloudcast.live/products

## Contact

- Support: support@cloudcast.regal
- Website: https://cloudcast.live
